inputs.label: Z-score
inputs.businessContext: Standard normal deviate (used if rawScoreProvided is 0)

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard normal deviate (used if rawScoreProvided is 0)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart normal standard (utilisé si rawScoreProvided est 0)
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación normal estándar (se usa si rawScoreProvided es 0)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف المعياري الطبيعي (يستخدم إذا كان rawScoreProvided = 0)

inputs.label: Mean
inputs.businessContext: Population mean for raw score conversion

businessContext_i18n.en: Population mean for raw score conversion
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ham puan dönüşümü için popülasyon ortalaması
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne de la population pour la conversion du score brut
businessContext_i18n.es: Media poblacional para la conversión de puntuación bruta

inputs.label: Raw Score
inputs.businessContext: Raw value to convert to Z-score

businessContext_i18n.en: Raw value to convert to Z-score
businessContext_i18n.de: Rohwert, der in einen Z-Wert umgerechnet werden soll
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur brute à convertir en score Z
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor bruto a convertir en puntuación Z

inputs.label: Use Raw Score?
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to compute Z-score from raw score, mean, stdDev; 0 to use given Z-score

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 to compute Z-score from raw score, mean, stdDev; 0 to use given Z-score
businessContext_i18n.tr: Z-puanını ham puan, ortalama ve standart sapmadan hesaplamak için 1; verilen Z-puanını kullanmak için 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf 1 setzen, um Z-Wert aus Rohwert, Mittelwert und StdAbw zu berechnen; 0, um einen gegebenen Z-Wert zu verwenden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mettre à 1 pour calculer le score Z à partir du score brut, de la moyenne et de l'écart-type ; 0 pour utiliser un score Z donné
businessContext_i18n.es: Establecer en 1 para calcular la puntuación Z a partir de la puntuación bruta, media y desviación estándar; 0 para usar una puntuación Z dada
businessContext_i18n.ar: اضبط على 1 لحساب درجة Z من الدرجة الخام والمتوسط والانحراف المعياري؛ 0 لاستخدام درجة Z معطاة
